transcript: My family just learned that Grandpa has an addiction to Viagra. No one is taking it harder than Grandma. Today, I'm going to recap a 2022 action-comedy film called Shotgun Wedding. The movie starts on a tropical island in the Philippines, where folks are gathered for Darcy Rivera and Tom Fowler's wedding. Darcy goes to a meal and talks with her mom, Renata, who feels the grand wedding is over the top. At the same time, Tom is prepping a surprise for Darcy on a speedboat, but is scared by a guard making him fall into the sea. Tom's mom, Carol, comes with her new husband, Larry. Concurrently, Darcy's dad, Robert, arrives with his new younger girlfriend, Harriet. This bothers Renata, who's still bitter about her split with Robert. While Darcy and Tom aim to hang out, Tom's best buddy, Ricky, drags him away, so Darcy chills with her younger sibling, Jamie. Things get trickier when Darcy's old flame Sean shows up, invited by Robert. He nicknames Darcy D.D., making Tom visibly uneasy. Everyone notices Tom's jealousy, especially when Sean gives a heartful talk about Darcy, overshadowing Tom's speech. Later, Tom's cis genie talks about her marriage issues in her own speech. When Darcy and Tom attempt to relax and get closer, Carol bargains in, trying to give advice but misses the mark. The pair decide to sleep in different rooms. The following day is the big wedding day. As everyone's getting ready, pirates head to the island after finding out about the wedding online. As Darcy dresses up with help from Renata, Jamie, and Carol, she feels uneasy. She messages Tom to chat, expressing her doubts about the grandeur of the wedding. They quarrel and consider cancelling the event. But just then, the pirates invade the place and hold everyone captive. Tom sees this and rushes to alert Darcy. The pirates shove everyone into a pool, demanding a $45 million ransom from Robert, aware of his riches. Tom pulls Darcy from her room and fills her in on the situation. Spotting an armed pirate trying to get in, they brainstorm how to stop him. They debate their options, Tom suggests using a net, while Darcy wants to spray hairspray in his eyes, but they're overpowered and end up bound together. The pirates intend to take them to their boss but Darcy tricks them by asking for a cigarette and sets their hair alight forcing them to flee. The duo tries to control the now driverless cart but Darcy's dress snags and tears off as they leap out and the cart plunges off a cliff. Another pirate confronts them but Darcy grabs a grenade made from him. Tom delivers a kick, sending the pirate crashing into a rock, fatally injuring him, which horrifies Tom. As they struggle to free themselves, Tom warns Darcy about the live grenade she's clutching. They hunt for a spot with mobile signal to call for assistance, but more pirates chase them, causing Darcy to lose her phone. They spot a zipline platform, and while sliding down, Darcy drops the grenade on two pursuing pirates, drawing more attention due to the resultant explosion. On landing, they're devastated to see their friends and family captured and strategize on getting assistance. The pair sneak into the kitchen, aiming to slice off their ties. As they manage to cut the bindings using a meat slicer, though Tom injures his hand badly, making Darcy pass out, a female pirate walks in. Tom confronts her and manages to knock her out by crashing her through a window. Once Darcy regains consciousness, she adjusts her torn dress and Don's boots, preparing to join Tom in their rescue mission. Heading to the resort's main office, There you go. regains consciousness, she adjusts her torn dress and Don's boots, preparing to join Tom in their rescue mission. Heading to the resort's main office, they find the internet's down. The owners, Margie and Ace, hide the duo in their safe room. As Margie tends to Tom's injury, she inadvertently mentions a pirate attack the previous summer, a fact Tom was already aware of. Darcy confronts Tom about his tendency to self-sabotage, his insecurities, and his decision to have such a grand wedding. Tom retorts that Darcy, too, hides behind a facade of confidence when she's actually afraid. Taking accountability for the situation since he invited everyone, Tom decides to face the threat head-on. When another pirate approaches, Ace and Margie guide the couple into a hidden passage. However, Tom emerges from hiding and surrenders, leaving Darcy concealed. When Tom is taken to the other captives, he provocatively says something in Balinese to the head pirate, which translates to curse your ancestor. Holding Sean at knife edge, Tom accuses him of being the mastermind behind the attack I don't know. in Balinese to the head pirate, which translates to curse your ancestor. Holding Sean at knife edge, Tom accuses him of being the mastermind behind the attack because of a phrase Sean uttered earlier. Recognizing it and deducing the pirates are Balinese, Tom even presents a wedding invite one of them possessed. Tom alleges Sean's motive is to extract ransom from Robert after being denied investment funds. Sean's pretense collapses and he aligns himself with the pirates, pointing a gun at Tom. Regretting their quarrel, Darcy, now with Ace and Margie, gets the push she needs to rescue everyone. Sean, now leading the pirates, hunts for Darcy, using Harriet as a hostage, and forwards a chopper with her. Darcy, now armed, reaches the scene, tries making amends with Tom, then confronts the pirates. They overpower her and group her with the hostages. One pirate, in particular, has a vendetta against Darcy for scaring his face. Everyone's shocked to discover Harriet's collusion when Larry unveils footage of her and Sean's intimacy. Aboard the chopper, Harriet kills the chief pirate using a lethal pressure point technique and then ejects him from the aircraft. Crafting an escape strategy, Darcy and Tom stage an impromptu wedding in the pool. The pirates, amused, permit it. As Carol instigates a rendition of I'll Be, the couple and their allies mount an offensive. Carol grabs a firearm, too. Using another explosive, they wipe out the pirates, triggering fireworks that alert Sean and Harriet. Ace and Margie guide the attendees to a safe spot, while Darcy and Tom tackle the adversaries. The duo reaches the pier and overpowers a novice pirate, aiming to escape using the motorboat Tom had originally planned to surprise Darcy with. Sean intercepts them, trying to persuade Darcy to align with him. However, she staunchly refuses. The pair quickly get into the boat, but Sean clings on, chasing them. From above, Harriet takes Ayn from the helicopter. As they speed away, a parasail ensnares both Tom and Sean, hoisting them into the air. Employing a strip of synthetic hair, Tom slides down, and with a cake knife, a gift from Carol, Darcy severs the parasail. This results in Sean meeting a grisly end in the helicopter's rotors, and the chopper plummets into the sea, taking Harry with it. Back on the island, Darcy and Tom reconcile fully and decide to proceed with their nuptials. Law enforcement arrives to detain the remaining pirates. The ceremony goes on, and as Darcy and Tom are pronounced married, Jamie and Ricky, who had been secretly involved, unintentionally ignite the final rocket. If you enjoyed this video, don't be shy to hit the like button, and if you disliked it, hit the dislike button twice, just to be sure. It would be best if you watched the whole movie. Thank you very much for watching. Please subscribe for more videos like this.
